opus48.description: Highest-reasoning model for architectural, implementation, and test-critical work

gemma4_ollama.description: Local gemma4 via Ollama for lightweight planning/triage tasks

neo.rationale: Lead architectural calls and high-impact trade-offs need strongest reasoning
neo.note: Default to opus48 for lead decisions and cross-cutting review work

trinity.rationale: Frontend implementation and API-contract reasoning benefit from stronger synthesis
trinity.note: Use opus48 for feature implementation and refactors with contract implications

tank.rationale: Backend/API contract and integration logic require high-confidence reasoning
tank.note: Use opus48 for server changes, protocol handling, and cross-cutting backend decisions

switch.rationale: Test design and edge-case analysis require deep reasoning over system behavior
switch.note: Use opus48 for test strategy, coverage decisions, and failure analysis

apoc.rationale: Routine pipeline and infra maintenance is mostly procedural and latency-sensitive
apoc.note: Use local gemma4 for CI/status and infra chores; escalate only when needed

scribe.rationale: Session logging and documentation are lightweight synthesis tasks
scribe.note: Use local gemma4 for history/decision capture and summarization

ralph.rationale: Monitoring, aggregation, and work tracking are lightweight classification tasks
ralph.note: Use local gemma4 for watch, alert, and status-rollup duties

coordinator.rationale: Coordinator routing and orchestration are lightweight planning and dispatch tasks
coordinator.note: Use local gemma4 for coordination unless explicitly overridden by user request
